name_en: Original Fendi Limited Edition Colorful Embroidered Baguette
name_cn:
Original Fendi Limited Edition Colorful Embroidered Baguette
The 'Baguette' is an indispensable classic in the fashion world, featuring colorful interlaced embroidery on a retro milk tea background, revealing a unique flavor!
Size 26x13x6cm
